posts.author: Markonj22
posts.content: Im predicting eather Rakic or Medic will be the main event, now im wondering who will they fight. Rakic will be at HW for sure fighting against some unranked guy prob, Medic will fight eather Mallot or Morales since most of ranked WW are already taken including Edwards. We might see Leka, Delija and Milos, maybe even Joker Ilic against Shara Bullet if he beats Barbir, since Shara and Joker have beef, Shara even replied to Ilics comment on UFC Belgrade announcment. We mights see Pericic too. Overall a potentially exciting event, cards will be sold out quickly.
